text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Osaka Hai, and Air Groove's
long-anticipated race against Silence Suzuka, has
arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Except Silence Suzuka—the opponent we were
aiming to beat, is absent.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka isn't here... but that doesn't mean I won't
give this race my all.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I must put my heart and soul into today's
challenge—and emerge readier than ever to face
Suzuka when the opportunity does arise.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
For now... I will show everyone a race worthy of
the Empress.
